strName.description: The code name of the loot entry, as referred to in other files.

strType.description: Enum tag dispatching to game code (condition, item, trigger, interaction, condrule, lifeevent, ship, pspec, relationship, text, data, ...). NOT a strName reference; render as a badge on detail pages and use to route aCOs targets via the type-routed-refs design.

aCOs.description: Loot entry strings ([-]Name=chance x min[-max]) applied by this loot table. Each name refers to entry within conditions.json by default, but the actual target folder is type-routed by sibling strType per the x-route-targets map.

aLoots.description: Loot entry strings ([-]Name=chance x min[-max]) referencing other loot tables. Each name refers to entry within loot.json.
